panels.description:
Shows in/out [samples](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/keyconcepts/#raw-samples) rate including push and pull models. 

The out-rate could be different to in-rate because of replication or additional timeseries added by vmagent for every scraped target.

Click on the line and choose Drilldown to show CPU usage per instance
panels.title: Samples Rate

panels.description: Errors rate shows rate for multiple metrics that track possible errors in vmagent, such as network or parsing errors.
panels.title: Errors Rate

panels.description:
Persistent queue size shows size of pending samples in bytes which hasn't been flushed to remote storage yet. 
Increasing of value might be a sign of connectivity issues. In such cases, vmagent starts to flush pending data on disk with attempt to send it later once connection is restored.
panels.title: Persistent Queue Size

panels.description: Shows number of generated  error messages in  logs over last 30m. Non-zero value may be a sign of connectivity or misconfiguration errors.
panels.title: Log Errors (30m)

panels.description: Click on the line and choose Drilldown to show CPU usage per instance
panels.title: CPU

panels.description: Shows the rate of requests served by vmagent HTTP server.
panels.title: Requests Rate

The out-rate could be different to in-rate because of replication or additional timeseries added by vmagent for every scraped target.

panels.description: Errors rate shows rate for multiple metrics that track possible errors in vmagent, such as network or parsing errors.

targets.expr:
# How many times vmagent failed to establish a TCP connection to a scrape target
sum(rate(vm_promscrape_dial_errors_total{job_origin="vmagent-scraper"}[$__rate_interval])) by(job) > 0

panels.title: Errors Rate

panels.description: Shows rate of [samples](https://docs.victoriametrics.com/keyconcepts/#raw-samples) scraped from configured targets.
panels.title: Samples Scraped/s

panels.description: Shows number of targets scraped per second.
panels.title: Targets Scraped/s

panels.description: Shows total configured scrape targets in state `up` or `down`.

panels.title: Scrape Targets

panels.description: Shows how close the scrape is to the configured timeout
panels.title: Scrape Timeout

panels.description:
Increments only when vmalert gives up on some rows and drops them from its remote-write queue. Typical causes:
- Remote-write queue is full
- Sustained downstream outage
- remoteWrite.maxQueueSize too small
- Ingest rate > egress rate for too long
panels.title: Dropped Remote Writes

panels.description:
Failed remote writes will retry until success or until the queue overflows. Typical causes:
- Remote endpoint unreachable / TCP failure
- Non-2xx HTTP response
- TLS / auth errors
- Context deadline exceeded (timeout)
panels.title: Failed Remote Writes
